applied_optimizations.name: FP8 prefill integration with radix cache path
applied_optimizations.description: Added FP8 prefill attention support for the radix-cache code path in the aiter attention backend. Key changes: (1) Extracted shared FP8 prefill attention logic into mla_fp8_prefill_attn() helper method, (2) Fixed init_forward_metadata to use kv_indptr instead of qo_indptr for FP8 prefill metadata when radix cache has prefix, (3) Fixed total_s calculation to use seq_lens_sum (covers full KV including prefix), (4) Added fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat path for MXFP4 weights in radix-cache branch to avoid separate FP8 casts, (5) Both no-prefix and prefix paths now use the shared mla_fp8_prefill_attn helper.

notes: The implementation follows the exact pattern from PR #20187 (commit 6407891b4)
Key insight: radix-cache path needs kv_indptr (not qo_indptr) for FP8 metadata since KV includes prefix tokens
fused_gemm_afp4wfp4_split_cat is used via layer.kv_b_proj() with a tuple argument containing fp8_dtype output type
